title: mesosphaerum odoratum
intro: Mesosphaerum odoratum, also known as Mexican tea or Mexican mint marigold, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum odoratum include relieving nausea, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, as well as having antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
